scope: Canadian energy-economic conditions with global oil-market and global-liquidity inputs.
note: Country percentiles are calculated against each country's own history and are not treated as a shared distribution.

datasets.title: Canada unemployment rate and U.S. unemployment rate
datasets.definitionDifference: Both are headline unemployment rates, but labour-force definitions and population dynamics differ.

datasets.title: Canada energy CPI growth and U.S. energy CPI growth
datasets.definitionDifference: Consumption baskets, regulated utility prices and energy systems differ.

datasets.title: Canada monthly real GDP growth and U.S. real GDP growth
datasets.definitionDifference: Canada uses monthly GDP by industry while the U.S. series is quarterly expenditure-side GDP.

datasets.title: Bank of Canada policy rate and U.S. federal funds rate
datasets.definitionDifference: Policy frameworks are comparable in purpose but not identical in implementation.
